title: static-mesh + decoder-paths follow-ups + renderer polish

stories.title: `M24-static-mesh` ‚úÖ Trimesh + heightfield collider kinds.
stories.summary: Scene schema gains per-kind `allOf+if/then` constraints (trimesh: `vertices` + `indices`, heightfield: `rows` √ó `columns` + row-major `heights` + `scale`). RapierAdapter.acquireCollider switches on the new kinds; heightfield maps `nrows = rows-1, ncols = columns-1` per Rapier's quad-count convention. `engine check` gains `AGF_RIGIDBODY3D_DYNAMIC_TRIMESH` (error), `AGF_COLLIDER3D_TRIMESH_LARGE` (warning, ‚â•50k vertices), `AGF_COLLIDER3D_HEIGHTFIELD_DIMS` (error). Spike `spikes/physics-rapier-v0/static-mesh-spike.ts` lands a dynamic ball on a 5√ó5 heightfield (y=0.299) + a slanted trimesh wedge (y‚âà0.30 after slide).
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: `M24-character sensor-exclude fix` ‚úÖ Carry-over hot-fix from Sprint 38: Rapier's KinematicCharacterController was treating sensor colliders‚Ä¶
stories.summary: `M24-character sensor-exclude fix` ‚úÖ Carry-over hot-fix from Sprint 38: Rapier's KinematicCharacterController was treating sensor colliders as movement obstacles. Beacon's 1.2 / 1.6 m sensor radii (sized to gameplay pickup / deposit / hazard range) blocked the drone from approaching anything. `computeColliderMovement` now passes `QueryFilterFlags.EXCLUDE_SENSORS` so sensors still emit enter/exit events but stop pushing the character.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: `M21-context-loss` ‚úÖ ThreeRenderAdapter subscribes to canvas `webglcontextlost` / `webglcontextrestored` events (with `preventDefault` on‚Ä¶
stories.summary: `M21-context-loss` ‚úÖ ThreeRenderAdapter subscribes to canvas `webglcontextlost` / `webglcontextrestored` events (with `preventDefault` on lost so the browser actually restores). startRuntime emits `AGF_RENDER_CONTEXT_LOST` (warning) + `AGF_RENDER_CONTEXT_RESTORED` (info) on the DiagnosticsBus. Listeners cleaned up in adapter.dispose.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: `M21-color` ‚úÖ `project.json#render.color.{toneMapping, exposure}` (default toneMapping `"none"` ‚Äî legacy linear) gives projects ACES Filmic‚Ä¶
stories.summary: `M21-color` ‚úÖ `project.json#render.color.{toneMapping, exposure}` (default toneMapping `"none"` ‚Äî legacy linear) gives projects ACES Filmic / AgX / Reinhard / Cineon highlight roll-off on opt-in. Adapter maps the schema enum to the matching Three.js constant; the initial ACES default was reverted to "none" after a perceived overlit shift on Beacon.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: `RUNTIME-renderer-ready` ‚úÖ `ThreeRenderer.render()` returns `true` iff there was an active camera + a real `adapter.draw()` ran.
stories.summary: start.ts seeds `RuntimeHandle.rendererReady: Promise<void>` resolved on the first such draw. Exposed via `AppHandle.rendererReady` ‚Üí `window.__agf.rendererReady` so tests + dev-bridge clients await it before snapshots / rendererInfo probes.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: `M21-mat-textures` ‚úÖ Material manifest schema gains `map` / `normalMap` (+ `normalScale`) / `roughnessMap` / `metalnessMap` / `emissiveMap`‚Ä¶
stories.summary: `M21-mat-textures` ‚úÖ Material manifest schema gains `map` / `normalMap` (+ `normalScale`) / `roughnessMap` / `metalnessMap` / `emissiveMap` (+ `emissiveIntensity`) / `aoMap`. MaterialPatch + MaterialBindingSystem forward through to `setMeshMaterialPatch`. Adapter holds a process-wide cached TextureLoader + URL‚ÜíTexture Map so a shared map is fetched once. Base-colour gets SRGBColorSpace; data maps stay linear per glTF. KTX2 routing through the S38 decoder singletons is deferred to ASSET-compression.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

followUps: `M25 / ASSET-compression` ‚Äî flip Draco / KTX2 / Meshopt flags on `createGlbLoader` for a real project, then route the texture-map loader through the shared KTX2Loader for `.ktx2` references. Foundation already in place (S38 decoders + S39 texture cache).
`M21-mat-custom` ‚Äî custom `ShaderMaterial` / `onBeforeCompile` shader kind for the manifest.
`M21-post-pipeline` ‚Äî schema-driven `project.json#renderer.post` chain (EffectComposer + Bloom / FXAA / SSAO / Outline).

`DEV-server-test-coexist` ‚Äî investigation: `playwright.config.ts` declares `reuseExistingServer: true` but preflight + ad-hoc test runs still sometimes interrupt the developer's live `npm run dev` on 5173. Tighten the probe or move headless tests to a separate port.
notes: Deliverables: `engine/physics/rapier/rapier-adapter.ts` ‚Äî trimesh + heightfield branches in acquireCollider; EXCLUDE_SENSORS in computeColliderMovement; `engine/physics/rapier/physics-sync-system.ts` ‚Äî Collider3D mirror fields for trimesh / heightfield; `engine/render/three-render-adapter.ts` ‚Äî context callbacks, color pipeline, TextureLoader cache, texture-map application; `engine/render/three-renderer.ts` ‚Äî render() returns boolean; `engine/runtime/start.ts` ‚Äî `rendererReady`, context callbacks ‚Üí diagnostics, color forwarding; `engine/runtime/asset-loaders/material-loader.ts` ‚Äî texture fields on MaterialManifest; `engine/render/systems/material-binding-system.ts` ‚Äî texture fields forwarded into MaterialPatch; `engine/tools/check/project-check.ts` ‚Äî `validatePhysicsColliders`; `engine/tools/check/diagnostic-codes.ts` ‚Äî 3 new codes; `schemas/scene.schema.json` ‚Äî trimesh + heightfield Collider3D kinds; `schemas/material.schema.json` ‚Äî texture-map fields; `schemas/project.schema.json` ‚Äî `render.color`; `src/app.ts` + `src/main.ts` ‚Äî rendererReady + color + context callbacks plumbed through; `spikes/physics-rapier-v0/static-mesh-spike.ts` (new); `tests/fixtures/physics-static-mesh/` (new project-check fixture); `tests/unit/scene-physics-schema.test.ts` ‚Äî 6 trimesh + heightfield cases; `tests/unit/material-manifest-schema.test.ts` ‚Äî 2 texture-map cases; `tests/unit/project-check.test.ts` ‚Äî AGF_RIGIDBODY3D_DYNAMIC_TRIMESH + AGF_COLLIDER3D_HEIGHTFIELD_DIMS case; `tests/unit/diagnostic-codes.test.ts` ‚Äî 3 new codes registered

Verification: `npm run preflight` ‚úÖ ‚Äî 387 unit tests + 21 e2e passed, 2-3 flaky-retried (the usual hmr-stress / multiclient-roundtrip / score-pulse set).; `beacon-world-gameplay.spec` ‚úÖ ‚Äî drone pickup + repair end-to-end through the now-non-blocking sensor wiring.; `project-switcher.spec` ("KeyD moves the Beacon World drone along +X") ‚úÖ.; Raycast spike + Static-mesh spike both green end-to-end against real Rapier.
